label: Transparent oasis palms motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only an oasis palms motif: a compact cluster of date palms with a small clear desert spring pool and a few reeds at the base, isolated full subject, no wider landscape, no props, no text.
Subject: oasis palms with accurate palm fronds, textured trunks, emerald palm leaves, blue water spring, warm sand at the root base, natural material detail, calm desert-spring identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject. Keep the silhouette readable as a single motif for a catalog thumbnail.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves emerald palm, blue water, and sand colors.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no extra landscape horizon, no buildings, no people, no animals, no decorative background, no second motif.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Oasis, derived from an oasis palms motif: emerald date palms, clear blue spring water, warm sand and stone. The system feel is a resource scheduling system for allocating scarce teams, rooms, energy, water, vehicles, and time windows.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from oasis palms, blue water, and sand. The board must visibly respect emerald palm, blue water, sand, reed, bark, and stone colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, spacious grid, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Oasis", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, resource schedule timeline, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
UI language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, quiet operational SaaS, dense but organized scheduling surfaces, precise grid, 8px card radius, subtle palm-frond dividers, water-line focus rings, sand paper texture.
Components to show: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, scheduler lanes, utilization chart, queue list, empty/error/loading states.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; multilingual product UI guidance; labels should be short and readable.
Color palette: use motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals: emerald palm, blue water, warm sand, bark umber, reed olive, stone gray.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no tiny unreadable text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode version of the Oasis design-system board. It must feel like the same resource scheduling system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the Oasis motif language: emerald palms, clear blue spring water, warm sand, reed olive, bark umber, stone gray. Preserve palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography from the light board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 3840x2160 target, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, spacious grid, avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Oasis", Dark Mode, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, resource schedule timeline, dashboard/data charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, semantic tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep palm-charcoal background, cool blue water highlights, emerald primary controls, warm sand text highlights, subtle palm-frond and water-ripple textures, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls. Operational SaaS for resource scheduling: teams, rooms, vehicles, energy, water, time windows.
Components to show: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, scheduler lanes, utilization chart, queue list, empty/error/loading states.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; multilingual product UI guidance; labels should be short and readable.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible text, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark.
